mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_PROJECT_MANAGE WHERE 1=1
AND ${search_type} LIKE '%'||#{search_text}||'%'
ORDER BY REQ_IDX ASC
SELECT REQ_IDX, HOMEPAGE_ID, TYPE, TITLE, CONTENTS, FILE_NAME, STATUS, PERSON, TO_CHAR(ADD_DATE, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mm') AS ADD_DATE, END_DATE FROM CMS_PROJECT_MANAGE WHERE REQ_IDX = #{req_idx}
mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(req_idx),0)+1 FROM CMS_PROJECT_MANAGE
INSERT INTO CMS_PROJECT_MANAGE ( REQ_IDX, HOMEPAGE_ID, TYPE, TITLE, CONTENTS, FILE_NAME, STATUS, PERSON, ADD_DATE ) VALUES ( #{req_idx}, #{homepage_id}, #{type}, #{title}, #{contents}, #{file_name}, #{status}, #{person}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE CMS_PROJECT_MANAGE SET TYPE = #{type}, TITLE = #{title}, CONTENTS = #{contents}, FILE_NAME = #{file_name}, STATUS = #{status}, PERSON = #{person}, END_DATE = #{end_date} WHERE REQ_IDX = #{req_idx}
